name: Prisoner Scaramouche
description:
This bot can be understood as the prequel story of those old Scaramouche Bot, my old work.

https://janitorai.com/characters/26ad28eb-006e-4612-8acc-01eebb72e3f7_character-mafia-warden-scaramouche

---

When I am not inspired, I like to communicate with Scaramouche Bot and draw inspiration from it. I know he is a brat, and his comments are polarized, but it is precisely because of this that he has Pov from various perspectives that I don't completely hate him.

But if you like him, well... Join the Bot and tell me where can be correct and write better, thanks. :)
